arts.ttl: Report: Blow for Nuno as Arne Slot makes contact to sign £15m Nottingham Forest target for Liverpool
Arsenal set to sign £51m Martin Zubimendi from Real Sociedad, with deal virtually completed to beat Liverpool and Man City for summer transfer - and Mikel Arteta wants a forward next
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL: The Real Sociedad star has been courted by Mikel Arteta for over 12 months and talks over a summer move are now at an advanced stage with sources indicating the deal is virtually completed.

arts.ttl: Genuine top four contenders? What can Nottingham Forest achieve this season?
arts.sum: At the start of the 2024/25 season, many people expected Nottingham Forest to be embroiled in yet another relegation battle, and it looked like it could even be the year they faced the drop....

arts.ttl: Liverpool Predicted Lineup vs. Nottingham Forest: Premier League
arts.sum: Liverpool could extend their lead at the top of the Premier League table to nine points with a win at Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate shares concerning injury update despite Liverpool return
arts.sum: Ibrahima Konate has admitted he is not yet 100% fit after returning from a knee injury for Liverpool earlier this month

arts.ttl: Club want rid of Nottingham Forest target ‘immediately’ – Will sanction loan, asking price considered high
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest are eyeing up a move for Sporting Club de Portugal midfielder Marcus Edwards, with the Portuguese side open to a loan deal. That’s according to Record, who report that Sporting are keen to move Edwards on this month if they can. arts.ttl: Arne Slot receives Liverpool transfer boost as target confirms future plans
arts.sum: Liverpool appear to be preparing their first transfer for Arne Slot in the summer, as the Reds look to move ahead of rivals Chelsea and Aston Villa in the race for Stefanos Tzimas

arts.ttl: Monchi negotiating Aston Villa arrival – Working to beat Liverpool and Newcastle, keen to sell Diego Carlos first
arts.sum: Aston Villa, Liverpool and Newcastle United are all reportedly keen on Sevilla’s Loïc Badé in the winter market. Last weekend, AS reported Liverpool and Newcastle are ‘betting heavily’ on the defender. The Villans have started discussions with the La Liga side over a deal for him this month. arts.ttl: Arne Slot sticking to his word after Darwin Nunez talks and Liverpool transfer claim
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez has struggled in front of goal for Liverpool this season, but there have been no indications from Arne Slot that the Reds want to cut their losses on the Uruguay star
